entry.title: IDC GS00Q17NSD3000 (P00191) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Per Section G of the contract and FAR Subpart 16.505

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE AT&T CORPS. SUBMISSION NUMBER AT00428.03A DATED FEBRUARY 24, 2020. THE SUBMISSION ADDS ACCESS ARRANGEMENT (AA) PRICES TO THE CONTRACT.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: 40 U.S.C. 11314 - AUTHORITY TO ACQUIRE AND MANAGE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE AT&T CORPS SUBMISSION NUMBER AT00403.04A DATED MARCH 17, 2020. THE SUBMISSION ADDS ACCESS ARRANGEMENT (AA) MONTHLY RECURRING CHARGE(MRC) AND NON-RECURRING CHARGE (NRC) PRICES TO THE CONTRACT.
